overview: A browser-based background remover that runs entirely client-side using on-device ML. Upload an image, remove its background in seconds, preview the before/after result, and download as a transparent PNG — no server, no API calls, no privacy concerns.
features: Drag-and-drop image upload with click-to-browse fallback
Client-side ML background removal using WASM (no external APIs)
One-click PNG download with transparent background
Upload another image to reset the flow
Responsive design for mobile and desktop
